HomeEventsArtists
About Us

WHO WE ARE

Sri Lanka's Premier
Event Discovery Platform

Events.lk was born from a simple belief — that great music and unforgettable live experiences should be accessible to everyone. We connect passionate fans with the events that move them.

OUR MISSION

Making Live Music
Accessible to All

We started Events.lk because we noticed a gap — amazing events happening across Sri Lanka, but no single place to discover them all. We set out to change that.

Today, we partner with hundreds of venues, promoters, and artists to bring you the most comprehensive event listing platform in the country.

0+

Events Listed

0K+

Happy Users

0M+

Total Reach

2018

Founded in Colombo

WHAT DRIVES US

Our Values

Passion for Music

We live and breathe music. Every event we feature is chosen with genuine love for the art.

Community First

We build bridges between artists, fans, and venues to create a thriving local music scene.

Global Reach

Bringing international acts to Sri Lanka and putting local talent on the world stage.

Seamless Experience

From discovery to the last note, we make every step of your event journey effortless.

Authentic Moments

We believe live music creates memories that last a lifetime. We're here to make those moments.

Quality Curation

Only the best events make it to our platform. Every listing is verified and quality-checked.

THE PEOPLE BEHIND IT

Meet the Team

Ashan Perera

Founder & CEO

Passionate about connecting Sri Lanka's music lovers with world-class events.

Dilani Wijesinghe

Head of Events

10+ years curating unforgettable live experiences across the island.

Niran Fernando

Lead Developer

Building the tech that powers seamless event discovery and ticketing.

Kavya Ratnayake

Creative Director

Designing the visual identity that makes every event feel extraordinary.

GET IN TOUCH

Let's Work Together

Whether you're a venue, artist, or promoter — we'd love to hear from you and explore how we can bring your events to a wider audience.
